title: galium brevifolium subsp. brevifolium
intro: Galium brevifolium subsp. brevifolium is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as Galium brevifolium. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. Galium brevifolium subsp. brevifolium can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for medicinal use, although its preparations should be made under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
